instruction:
We know that the function $y=y \left(x \right)$ satisfies $x \left( \operatorname{l n} x-1 \right) y^{\prime} \left( x \right)+\left( 3-\operatorname{l n} x^{2} \right) y \left( x \right)=0, \quad x > e, \, \mathrm{ and} \, y \left( \mathrm{e}^{2} \right)=\frac{e^4}{2},$ $y=y \left( x \right)$ the minimum value of ().

Options:
A. $$3e^2$$
B. $$3e^4$$
C. $$3e^3$$
D. $$5e^3$$
E. $$2e^3$$
F. $$e^4$$
G. $$e^3$$
H. $$e^2$$
I. $$2e^2$$
J. $$2e^4$$
